Article.ArticleTitle: Load- and velocity-specific adaptations to lower-body maximal strength training (MST), hypertrophy training (HT) and explosive strength training (EST).

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Faculty of Education and Arts, Nord University, Universitetsalléen 11, 8026, Bodø, Norway. glenn.trane@nord.no.
Faculty of Education and Arts, Nord University, Universitetsalléen 11, 8026, Bodø, Norway.
Faculty of Education and Arts, Nord University, Universitetsalléen 11, 8026, Bodø, Norway.
Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences, Norwegian University of Science and Technology, Trondheim, Norway.
Medical Rehabilitation Clinic, Treningsklinikken, Trondheim, Norway.
Faculty of Education and Arts, Nord University, Universitetsalléen 11, 8026, Bodø, Norway.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors declare that no conflict of interest exists regarding publication of this paper. Ethical approval: The study was carried out in accordance with general ethical guidelines of Nord University and the Declaration of Helsinki. The Norwegian Knowledge Sector’s Service Provider (SIKT) approved the data storage procedures of the present investigation (SIKT reg. 393314). Consent to participate: All included subjects gave their written consent to participate, after having received information about the study.
